category_title: Elementary students with ASD who engage in head-banging and arm-biting during transitions and independent work
minimal_context: Jake is waiting at his desk during an unstructured transition period before specials.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay Jake, our activity is finished. We have a five-minute break before we transition to specials. Just sit at your desk and wait.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake sits at his desk without any materials, left unoccupied during the transition period.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We still have a few more minutes of waiting time before we go.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake begins biting his arms while sitting alone with no activities.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jake, please stop doing that. Just wait quietly.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake continues to engage in SIB, biting his arms and beginning to head-bang against the desk during the unstructured transition.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Okay Jake, our activity is finished. We have a five-minute break before we transition to specials. Just sit at your desk and wait.

STUDENT: (Jake sits at his desk without any materials, left unoccupied during the transition period.)

TUTOR: We still have a few more minutes of waiting time before we go.

STUDENT: (Jake begins biting his arms while sitting alone with no activities.)

TUTOR: Jake, please stop doing that. Just wait quietly.

STUDENT: (Jake continues to engage in SIB, biting his arms and beginning to head-bang against the desk during the unstructured transition.)

context.environment: School environment during transitions and specials
context.materials: iPad, fidget spinner, stuffed animal, and bouncy ball

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Engaging in SIB, specifically head-banging and biting his arms

behavior_patterns.condition: When deprived of social interaction or access to preferred activities
